sources.name: Material Design
sources.usage: component state hierarchy and color role inspiration
sources.notes: Do not copy implementation code or Material-specific naming into core theme source. Use for reference patterns only.

sources.name: Fluent Design System
sources.usage: Win32/desktop UI patterns, depth, and layering inspiration
sources.notes: Primary reference for Spaces desktop shell UI patterns. Do not embed Fluent-specific component names or tokens.

sources.name: Bootstrap
sources.usage: component role and layout pattern inspiration
sources.notes: Use for reference patterns and naming comparisons only. Do not introduce Bootstrap class names or utility-first patterns.

sources.name: Tabler UI
sources.usage: dashboard and control component naming inspiration
sources.notes: Reference for admin/dashboard UI patterns. Unrelated to Tabler Icons despite shared branding.

sources.name: shadcn/ui
sources.usage: semantic component naming and state pattern inspiration
sources.notes: Component API patterns used as a reference model for semantic component token naming conventions.

sources.name: Radix Primitives
sources.usage: component behavior and accessibility state reference
sources.notes: Used as a reference for component state coverage (open/closed, checked/unchecked, selected, disabled, etc.).

sources.name: Ant Design
sources.usage: component token naming and design variable conventions
sources.notes: Ant Design v5 design token system used as a reference for component-level token granularity.
